title: selaginella effusa
intro: Selaginella effusa is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant also known as spikemoss, which belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella effusa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and protecting against oxidative stress. This plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
